nodes.context: New York street gang active in the late 19th century, known as dandies.
Rival gang that robbed a jewelry store to compete with Cherry Hill Gang.
Main rivals of the Cherry Hill Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Throughout the decade, rival gangs would attempt to compete with the gang's success. One incident in particular occurred when, after the Batavia Street Gang announced hosting a party at New Irving Hall, the Cherry Hillers planned to arrive in expensive wardrobe.
edges.context: The Batavia Street Gang competed with the Cherry Hill Gang by hosting a party and robbing a jewelry store to outdo them.

edges.evidence_quote: Their main rivals were the Whyos
edges.context: The Whyos are stated as the main rivals of the Cherry Hill Gang.
